pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point for discovering local family events, classes, workshops, and memberships with quick search and date shortcuts.
primary_functions: Provide global search by keyword, date or date range, and location from the main header search bar.
Offer quick date shortcuts such as 'This Weekend', upcoming Saturday/Sunday, and next month.
Highlight main sections: Events, Classes & Programs, Workshops & Camps, Seasonal & Holiday, Memberships & Passes, and Map view.
Show featured and popular activities with links to their details on the browse and activity detail pages.
Provide quick access to personal tools: Day Plan, Favorites, Watchlist, and Cart.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Events' section tile
Click 'Classes & Programs' section tile
Click 'Workshops & Camps' section tile
Click 'Seasonal & Holiday' section tile
Click 'Memberships & Passes' section tile
Click 'Map view' section tile or header 'Map' link
Submit main header search form
Click 'Upcoming Saturday' shortcut
Click 'Upcoming Sunday' shortcut
Click 'This Weekend' shortcut
Click 'Next Month' shortcut
Click on a featured/popular activity card

access_methods.description: Main site logo and 'Home' header link navigate to the homepage
Users can land directly via root URL or bookmarks

pages.name: Browse Activities
pages.description: Unified list and calendar view for browsing and filtering events, classes, workshops, and seasonal activities.
primary_functions: Display a list (and optional calendar view) of activities filtered by context (e.g., events, classes_programs, workshops_camps, seasonal_holiday) via URL parameters such as categoryId.

Provide filters including date or date range, age range, price (including 'Free only' and max price), time of day, day of week, distance from default location, categories, schedule/recurrence (e.g., weekly), rating, tags/features (e.g., holiday, free_parking), accessibility (e.g., sensory_friendly, stroller_friendly), and distance.
Support sorting options such as 'Start time – Earliest first', 'Price – Low to High', 'Rating – High to Low', and 'Distance – Nearest first'.
Allow switching the active date using a calendar icon/date picker (e.g., selecting upcoming Sunday or a whole next month range).
Allow users to click an activity card to open the full details on the activity detail page.
Surface context-specific views such as 'Seasonal & Holiday', 'Workshops & Classes', and 'Classes & Programs' by pre-configuring filters via URL parameters.

incoming_params.description: Top-level content context: 'events', 'classes_programs', 'workshops_camps', or 'seasonal_holiday'. Controls default filters and labels.
Search term entered in the header or page search bar, e.g., 'outdoor', 'parade', 'lights'.
Single active date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format for day-based browsing (e.g., upcoming Saturday or Sunday).
Start of date range in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format (e.g., next month start, Dec 20).
End of date range in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format (e.g., next month end, Dec 24).
Filter identifier from getActivityFilterOptions.age_ranges (e.g., 'age_5_8', 'age_10_12').
Minimum age in years used in filtering; usually derived from selected ageRange.
Maximum age in years used in filtering; usually derived from selected ageRange.
Maximum ticket price used for filters such as 'under $20', 'under $40', 'under $50'.
Whether to restrict results to activities where price_type = 'free'.
Time-of-day bucket, e.g., 'morning', 'afternoon', 'evening', 'daytime', 'after_4pm'.
Comma-separated list of days of week (e.g., 'saturday', 'monday,tuesday,Wednesday').
Maximum distance in miles from the user's default location (e.g., 5, 10).
Comma-separated list of activity_category values (e.g., 'indoor', 'parks_playgrounds', 'storytime', 'shows_performances').
Recurrence filter value, one of 'one_time', 'weekly', 'multi_day', 'seasonal'.
Minimum rating value (e.g., 4.5) for rating-based filtering.
Comma-separated tag values, e.g., 'holiday', 'free_parking'.
Comma-separated accessibility feature values, e.g., 'sensory_friendly,stroller_friendly'.
Sort key from getActivityFilterOptions.sort_options, e.g., 'start_time_earliest', 'price_low_to_high', 'rating_high_to_low', 'distance_nearest_first'.
Page number for paginated results.
Presentation mode, such as 'list' or 'calendar'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an activity card in the list or calendar view
Click 'Map' header link or toggle to map view from browse

access_methods.description: Accessed via header links 'Events', 'Classes & Programs', 'Workshops & Camps', and 'Seasonal & Holiday' with categoryId preset.
Accessed when homepage search or shortcuts link into a filtered browse view using query parameters.

pages.name: Map View
pages.description: Map-based interface for finding nearby activities and adding them to a day plan.
primary_functions: Display an interactive map centered on the user’s default location or a searched neighborhood.
Provide a map search field to search and center the map on a specific area (e.g., 'Riverside Park').
Offer a distance or radius control (e.g., 2 miles) around the selected area to limit visible activities.
Provide category filters such as playground, storytime, parks_playgrounds, indoor, outdoor and others relevant to map results.
Allow clicking activity markers to open popups with key details and actions such as 'View Details' (linking to activity_detail.html) and 'Add to Day Plan'.

incoming_params.description: Latitude used to center the map; defaults to user’s default location if not provided.
Longitude used to center the map; defaults to user’s default location if not provided.
Location identifier (e.g., for 'Riverside Park') used to center the map around a known place.
Search radius in miles around the map center (e.g., 2 for the Riverside Park neighborhood).
Start date for map activity filtering.
End date for map activity filtering.
Comma-separated list of activity_category values to show on the map (e.g., 'playground', 'storytime').
Comma-separated list of content_group values for filtering (e.g., 'events').
Time-of-day bucket filter applied to map activities.
Comma-separated days of week filter for map activities.
Comma-separated tag values used in map filtering (e.g., 'holiday').
Comma-separated accessibility feature values used in map filtering.
Price type filter for map activities (e.g., 'free', 'paid').
Maximum price filter applied to activities shown on the map.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Details' in a map marker popup
Click 'View Day Plan' after adding items from the map
Toggle from map view back to list view

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Map' header link
Accessible via 'Map View' footer link
Accessed when other pages deep-link to a map centered on a specific neighborhood or filtered set of activities

pages.name: Activity Details
pages.description: Detail page for a single event, class, workshop, or program.
primary_functions: Display full information about the activity, including description, schedule, age range, price, location/distance, tags (e.g., holiday, free_parking), accessibility features, and rating.
Provide primary actions: 'Add to Favorites', 'Add to Day Plan', and for ongoing programs 'Add to Watchlist'.
Provide a 'Register' or 'Book Now' button for activities that require registration or booking, leading to the registration page.
Show available sessions or time slots (e.g., Saturday morning workshop sessions) for selection, feeding into day plan or registration flows.
Offer navigation back to the previous browse or map view while preserving applied filters and sort order.

incoming_params.description: Activity identifier used to load full details for the selected event, class, workshop, or program.
Optional date (YYYY-MM-DD) that can be used to preselect a session or to add the activity to a specific day plan.
Optional encoded URL of the originating list or map view to support 'Back to results' navigation while preserving filters.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Register' or 'Book Now' button after choosing a session if applicable
Click a 'View Day Plan' link after adding the activity to the day plan
Click 'Back to results' when returnUrl is not available (fallback using history or default browse view)

access_methods.description: Accessed from lists, maps, favorites, watchlist, and day plan via activity id parameter in the URL

pages.name: Memberships & Passes
pages.description: Listing and comparison of available memberships and passes.
primary_functions: List available memberships and passes with key details such as price, type (e.g., family, individual), headline benefits, and included free events.
Provide filters including membership type (e.g., family), price with maximum price (e.g., under $150), duration, and benefits.
Allow selecting multiple memberships with a 'Compare' checkbox and showing a comparison view/table on the same page via a 'Compare selected' button.
Within the comparison table, clearly display rows such as 'Included free events per year' so users can identify the best plan.
Enable navigation to a detailed membership page via membership name or 'View details' links.

incoming_params.description: Filter for membership_type (e.g., 'family', 'individual'). Used to preselect family memberships.
Maximum membership price filter, e.g., 150 for 'under $150' plans.
Sort key such as 'price_low_to_high', 'price_high_to_low', or 'included_free_events_desc'.
Comma-separated list of membership ids selected for comparison.
Page number for membership list pagination.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on membership name or 'View details' link
Click 'View Cart' control in header or page-level cart link

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Memberships & Passes' header link
Accessible via 'Memberships & Passes' footer link
May be linked directly from homepage sections or help content

pages.name: Membership Detail
pages.description: Detail view for a specific membership or pass product.
primary_functions: Present comprehensive membership information including benefits, number of included free events per year, pricing tiers, and terms.
Allow users to select billing period options (e.g., annual) if applicable.
Provide an 'Add to Cart' button to add the selected membership configuration to the cart.
Offer links back to the memberships listing and comparison view for easy reassessment.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the membership product to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add to Cart' and then choose to view the cart or proceed
Click 'Back to memberships' link

access_methods.description: Accessed when a membership is selected from the Memberships & Passes listing or from other cross-links

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Overview of selected memberships or passes awaiting confirmation.
primary_functions: Display items currently in the cart, including selected memberships and their billing periods.
Allow users to review prices, remove items, or adjust simple options (e.g., billing period if supported here).
Provide a 'Confirm Selection' or 'Proceed' action to finalize membership choices (without implementing payment processing).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Continue browsing memberships' from the cart
Click on a membership name in the cart to review details

access_methods.description: Typically accessed via a cart icon or 'Cart' link in the global header/user tools area

pages.name: Registration
pages.description: Registration form for bookable events, workshops, and classes.
primary_functions: Display key summary details of the selected activity (name, date, age range, price per participant).
Provide a form to enter number of participants, parent/guardian name, contact phone, and any required contact information.
Allow selecting a specific session or time slot (e.g., available Saturday morning session) from dropdowns or time lists.
Offer a 'Confirm Registration' button to submit the registration and show a confirmation state or message.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the activity to register for.
Optional session identifier for a specific time slot (e.g., a particular Saturday morning workshop session).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to activity' link after registration confirmation
Optional link 'Add to day plan' after successful registration

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Register' / 'Book Now' buttons on activity detail pages with activityId and optional sessionId
Registration form submission stays on this page to show confirmation state

pages.name: Favorites
pages.description: Central place to view and manage saved favorite events and activities.
primary_functions: List all activities that have been added to favorites, including holiday events, sensory-friendly events, and general favorites.
Allow filtering or grouping favorites by date, category (e.g., indoor, outdoor, seasonal_holiday), or tag.
Provide quick actions to open each activity’s detail page or remove items from favorites.
Support adding favorite activities directly to the day plan from this list.

incoming_params.description: Optional filter for favorites starting from this date.
Optional filter for favorites up to this date.
Comma-separated list of content_group values to filter favorites (e.g., 'events,seasonal_holiday').
Comma-separated list of activity_category values, e.g., 'indoor,outdoor'.
Comma-separated tags filter, e.g., 'holiday,free_parking'.
Sort key such as 'date_soonest', 'added_recently', or 'price_low_to_high'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a favorite item’s title or card
Click 'Open Day Plan' after adding favorite items to the day plan

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Favorites' header link

pages.name: Day Plan
pages.description: Planner interface to review and organize activities selected for a specific day.
primary_functions: Display all activities added to the day plan for a selected date, organized by time of day (morning, afternoon, evening).
Allow users to adjust time slots (where flexible) and reorder or remove activities from the plan.
Provide navigation to activity detail pages for refinement and access to registration if needed.
Offer a way to switch dates to plan different days and to see total time and approximate cost for the day.

incoming_params.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) whose day plan should be displayed and edited.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an activity in the day plan to view full details

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Day Plan' header link (defaults to today’s date if no date parameter is provided)
Accessed with a specific date parameter when navigated from map, favorites, or activity detail flows

pages.name: Watchlist
pages.description: Saved list of ongoing classes and programs the user is interested in.
primary_functions: Display classes and ongoing programs added via 'Add to Watchlist' on activity detail pages.
Allow users to filter watchlisted items by age range, schedule (e.g., weekday, after 4 PM), and distance.
Provide actions to view full details, register for a class, or remove from the watchlist.

incoming_params.description: Minimum age filter for watchlisted classes.
Maximum age filter for watchlisted classes.
Filter watchlist items by recurrence (e.g., 'weekly').
Comma-separated list of weekdays used to filter watchlisted classes.
Time-of-day bucket filter (e.g., 'after_4pm').
Maximum distance in miles from the user's default location when filtering watchlisted items.
Sort key such as 'distance_nearest_first' or 'start_time_earliest'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a class/program in the watchlist
Click 'Register' from a watchlist item

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Watchlist' footer link

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the local family events guide.
primary_functions: Explain the purpose of the site and how activities are sourced.
Reassure users about accuracy, safety focus, and local coverage.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About' footer link

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact information and basic feedback form.
primary_functions: Provide contact details such as email and phone for support or inquiries.
Offer a simple form for submitting questions, suggestions, or corrections.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' footer link
Submitting the contact form stays on this page and shows a confirmation message

pages.name: Help & FAQ
pages.description: Help center with frequently asked questions and usage tips.
primary_functions: Answer common questions about searching, filtering, favorites, day plan, registrations, and memberships.
Provide brief step-by-step guides for tasks like planning a full day or using the map view.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click contextual link from a help article to start browsing events
Click contextual link from a map-related help article

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Help & FAQ' footer link

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Information on data handling and user privacy.
primary_functions: Explain what data is collected and how it is used and stored.
Describe user choices regarding cookies, analytics, and communications.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Privacy Policy' footer link

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the website.
primary_functions: Define acceptable use, limitations of liability, and disclaimers.
Clarify rules related to event information, memberships, and external links.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Terms & Conditions' footer link

header_links.description: Homepage with search, date shortcuts, and featured activities
Seasonal and holiday events and activities
Browse and compare memberships and passes
View and edit your planned day of activities
View and manage your favorite activities

footer_links.description: About the local family events guide
Help center and frequently asked questions
View saved classes and ongoing programs
